title: Three sentence kinds together
description: Mix it all — period, question, excitement
text: I see a cat. Is it black? Yes! Look at it run. Wow! Where does it go? It goes home. The end!

character_tips.anna: Three sentence kinds. Each has its own ending.
character_tips.maxim: Three sentence endings. Practice mixing them.
character_tips.klavochka: All three friends together, my dear 💖
